rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Ruling On Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF JOANNE REINHART's Motion To Reconsider Ruling On Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED, lack of jurisdiction. Judgment was entered on September 3, 2013. Motion for reconsideration was filed on September 4, 2013. APRI Ins. Co v. Sup. Ct. (1999) 76 Cal.App.4th 176. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETER GRIMES et al VS. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notie Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pltf'S Complaint With Prejudice For Failure To Timely Amend;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint With Prejudice For Failure To Timely Amend DENIED without prejudice. Proof of Service for Notice of Entry of Order filed on August 8, 2013 fails to indicate any method of service. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIA PETERSON VS. G. MAZZERA COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT G. MAZZERA COMPANY Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions OFF CALENDAR to Department 501. Transferred to Department 302 to be heard on September 27, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NINA ZHIGADLO VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for punitive damages in the Negligence cause of action without leave to amend. Motion is denied otherwise. Defendant's Motion to Strike is timely and has not been previously ruled upon. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NINA ZHIGADLO VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT HYDE STREET HOLDING COMPANY, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to attach the lease agreement referenced in FAC and to specify which allegations/causes of action are brought by which plaintiff against which defendant. Plaintiff shall have 10 days form Notice of Entry of Order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUL D. DORN et al VS. EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION NOW DOING BUSINESS AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., INDIVIDUALY AND AS, EMC MORTGAGE, LLC F/K/A EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND to allege in good faith each element of Plaintiff's 13 causes of action. Plaintiff failed to file a meaningful opposition. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AN HO PENG VS. GREGORY A. POTTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 8. Defendant's Motion To Set Aside Default DENIED. Defendant failed to present competent evidence to rebut presumption of proper service. Additionally, Defendant concedes that he had notice of a lawsuit filed against him. Defendant fails to sustain burden both under CCP 473.5 and CCP 473(b). CCP 425.11 is not applicable. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY MAR VS. NANCY E SCHWAB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 6. Plaintiff's Motion To Vacate Dismissal And For Entry Of Judgment Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES W. COLLINS VS. BERLIN C. ARRIOLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT BERLIN ARRIOLA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Non-opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from Notice of Entry of Order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES W. COLLINS VS. BERLIN C. ARRIOLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 27, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT BERLIN ARRIOLA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)
